bank.retain_mission: Extract spatial-computing decisions across visionOS, XR, and macOS Metal pipelines: interaction models, rendering choices, performance budgets, comfort/safety constraints, and prototyping outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target devices, input modalities, performance budgets (frame time, thermals), comfort guidelines, and recurring user-testing findings. Ignore one-off prototype tweaks.

mental_models.name: Spatial Targets & Constraints
mental_models.source_query: Which spatial devices, OSes, and input modalities are we targeting? Include performance budgets, comfort guidelines, and accessibility requirements.

mental_models.name: Interaction & Rendering Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What interaction patterns and rendering approaches have we validated? Include user-testing findings on comfort, legibility, and presence.
